messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0025",
  "title": "中国移动游戏2025年新品收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 10,
  "page_range": "10"
}

Section text:
## 中国移动游戏2025年新品收入TOP榜

message.content: This section presents a ranking of the highest-grossing new mobile games released in China in 2025. It is structured to answer retrieval queries regarding: **Topics & Entities** (specific Chinese mobile game titles launched in 2025), **Dates** (the 2025 release period), **Metrics** (revenue/grossing performance figures), and **Evidence Types** (comparative ranking data, typically formatted as a list or table). The section serves as a reference for identifying and comparing top-performing new mobile game releases in the Chinese market for the specified year.
